---
title: "(α)typicalquant"
---

This is a personal website.

All views are my own.

```{r} 

1 + 1

```

<hr>

This website was built with Quarto. To learn more visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.


<hr>

```{=html}
Navbar image credit: “<a href="https://www.flickr.com/photos/nasawebbtelescope/55118095230" title="NASA Reveals New Details About Dark Matter’s Influence on Universe">NASA Reveals New Details About Dark Matter’s Influence on Universe</a>” by <a href="https://www.flickr.com/photos/nasawebbtelescope/">NASA's James Webb Space Telescope</a>, <a href="https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/deed.en" rel="license noopener noreferrer">CC BY 4.0</a>
```
